---
title: "Experience"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-section">
  <p class="page-intro">
    A timeline of my professional journey — roles, companies, and what I built along the way.
  </p>

  <div class="timeline">

    <!-- ============================================================
         EXPERIENCE ENTRY — copy this block for each role
         ============================================================ -->
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
      <div class="timeline-card">
        <div class="timeline-header">
          <div class="timeline-title-group">
            <h3>[Job Title]</h3>
            <span class="timeline-company">[Company Name]</span>
            <span class="timeline-location"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> [City, Country or Remote]</span>
          </div>
          <span class="timeline-date">[Start Month Year] – [End Month Year or Present]</span>
        </div>
        <p class="timeline-type">[Full-time / Part-time / Contract / Internship]</p>
        <ul class="timeline-bullets">
          <li>[Key responsibility or achievement — use numbers where possible, e.g. "Grew user base by 40%"]</li>
          <li>[Key responsibility or achievement 2]</li>
          <li>[Key responsibility or achievement 3]</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="timeline-tags">
          <span class="tag">[Skill/Tool 1]</span>
          <span class="tag">[Skill/Tool 2]</span>
          <span class="tag">[Skill/Tool 3]</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ============================================================
         EXPERIENCE ENTRY 2
         ============================================================ -->
    <div class="timeline-item">
      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
      <div class="timeline-card">
        <div class="timeline-header">
          <div class="timeline-title-group">
            <h3>[Job Title]</h3>
            <span class="timeline-company">[Company Name]</span>
            <span class="timeline-location"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> [City, Country or Remote]</span>
          </div>
          <span class="timeline-date">[Start Month Year] – [End Month Year]</span>
        </div>
        <p class="timeline-type">[Full-time / Part-time / Contract / Internship]</p>
        <ul class="timeline-bullets">
          <li>[Key responsibility or achievement 1]</li>
          <li>[Key responsibility or achievement 2]</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="timeline-tags">
          <span class="tag">[Skill/Tool 1]</span>
          <span class="tag">[Skill/Tool 2]</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Add more timeline-item blocks as needed -->

  </div>
</div>
```
